name: salvinorin a
mechanism: Salvinorin A is a potent kappa-opioid receptor agonist producing dissociative and hallucinogenic effects.
contraindications: cns depressants may potentiate sedative effects
summary: Salvinorin A is a potent kappa-opioid receptor agonist producing dissociative and hallucinogenic effects.
